推荐场景: 跨文化饭局｜识别礼貌表达差异
60秒任务: 「礼貌差异」：礼貌差异/文化误会修复；A=听懂潜台词并稳住关系；B=误判立场/过度直接翻车。
目标功能: 文化解释｜误解修复｜语气判断｜礼貌｜幽默边界｜适应
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
In my culture, we usually ___.（解释文化习惯）
That might sound direct, but it’s meant to be ___.（解释语气）
I don’t want to sound rude, but ___.（礼貌提出不同意见）
Could we say that in a softer way?（调整表达方式）
I see your point, but the tone may feel too ___.（评价语气）
Maybe they expected a more formal reply.（解释期待差异）
It depends on the context and relationship.（说明情境影响）
What feels polite here may feel distant elsewhere.（比较礼貌差异）
I didn’t realize that could sound impolite.（承认误差）
Thanks for letting me know.（接受反馈）
Let me rephrase that.（修复表达）
I meant it as a compliment, not criticism.（澄清意图）
Would it be better to say ___?（请求确认）
I’ll keep that in mind next time.（表示适应）
Let’s check how people usually handle this here.（寻找本地做法）
The key issue is the tone, not the words.（抓住隐含重点）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: tone, context, relationship, custom, expectation, boundary
Verbs: soften, clarify, rephrase, adapt, expect, respect
Adjectives: polite, impolite, formal, informal, direct, distant
Time / Place: here, elsewhere, next time, in public, at work, online
Chunks: cultural norm, local custom, softer way, formal reply, sound rude, keep that in mind
